name: M3 - Shooting Engine + Bullet System Core
objective: Implement shooting engine (left-click intercept, ShootC2SPacket, fire rate control, 9-step timing, spread algorithm) and bullet system core (BulletManager, flight, collision, penetration, damage, trait hooks, independent firing) for ModularShoot framework

reference_files.reason: System 6: Shooting behavior engine - left-click intercept, 9-step shooting timing, spread algorithm, sound, right-click API, shooting events
System 7: Bullet system - BulletManager, BulletSnapshot, BulletRecord, flight, collision detection, penetration, damage application, trait hooks, independent firing
System 12: Network sync - ShootC2SPacket design, modifier version anti-cheat, server-side processing flow
System 10: ShootPredicate API - shooting condition checker, ShootPredicateResult
API overview - ModularShootAPI methods, BulletManager API, damage type constants

exit_criteria: Left-click attack interception implemented (main-hand gun cancels vanilla attack)
ShootC2SPacket shooting request packet implemented (C->S, carries modifierVersion, based on CustomPacketPayload)
Server-side fire rate control implemented (MinecraftServer.getTickCount(), interval=max(1,round(20/fire_rate)), fire_rate<=0 no shooting)
Modifier version anti-cheat implemented (inconsistency counter, >=3 flags as cheat)
Shooting timing engine steps 1-9 implemented (intercept->fire rate->ShootPredicate->PreShootEvent->snapshot->spread->register bullet->sound->PostShootEvent)
Spread algorithm implemented (elliptical sampling: r=sqrt(random), theta in [0,2pi), horizontal=r*accuracy_yaw*cos(theta), vertical=r*accuracy_pitch*sin(theta))
BulletSnapshot + BulletRecord data structures defined (stats/traits/damageType/shooter/gunId/gunInstanceUuid/state maps, position/direction/traveledDistance/age/bulletId)
BulletManager implemented (per-dimension, chunk bucketing index, int ID counter from 1 monotonic increment no reuse, near INT_MAX wraparound + WARN)
Bullet flight advancement implemented (per tick by bullet_speed along direction, no gravity)
Collision detection implemented (bullet_size>0 capsule continuous collision; bullet_size=0 ray degeneration; nearest hit semantics: block vs entity take nearer)
Penetration logic implemented (entity_penetration/block_penetration counting, penetrated entity Set<UUID> + block Set<BlockPos> dedup)
Range check + unloaded chunk handling implemented (exceed range triggers onExpire; unloaded chunk direct onExpire removal, no force load)
Damage application implemented (clear invuln frames target.setInvulnerableTicks(0) + normal hurt(), preserve armor/resistance/events)
DamageSource construction implemented (shooter non-null uses as attacker, null no attacker)
Damage post-processor chain implemented (DamageHandler register, chain execution in registration order)
Trait runtime hooks implemented (onTick/onHit/onBlockHit/onExpire/onRemove + RemoveReason enum + TraitHookType + registerTraitHook API)
BulletManager.fireBullet() independent firing implemented (turret/trap, shooter can be null, gunId/gunInstanceUuid always null)
ShootPredicate API implemented (condition checker, failure(reason) displays reason)
PreShootEvent/PostShootEvent/GunRightClickEvent implemented (NeoForge EVENT_BUS, cancellable PreShoot/GunRightClick, non-cancellable PostShoot)
Preset damage type modularshoot:bullet_damage created (data-driven DamageType)
Project compiles successfully (gradle build / compileJava no errors)
Verification: left-click shooting hits entity causing damage; penetration hits multiple targets; block penetration count correct; independent firing usable
